prose:
A Fukui reactivity analysis was performed on ferrocene using the GFN2-xTB semi-empirical tight-binding method in the gas phase, at the user-specified charge of 0 and multiplicity of 1.

The results indicate that the site most susceptible to electrophilic attack (the most nucleophilic site) is the iron atom (Fe, atom index 10, label 11). The condensed-to-atom Fukui index for this site, *f*⁻, is 0.25938. The calculation was completed successfully and the engine's integrity check passed. No warnings were reported.
